title: Create: Refilling Boxes
description: Adds boxes that can automatically put in or take out items to keep a certain amount of items in your inventory.
body:
# *For non-Create version, check [Refilling Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/refilling-boxes)!*
# Create: Refilling Boxes
Adds boxes that can automatically put in or take out items to keep a certain amount of items in your inventory.
## Items
- **Andesite Refilling Box**: 9 slots, transfers 5 items per second
- **Brass Refilling Box**: 27 slots, transfers 10 items per second
- **Netherite Refilling Box**: 54 slots, transfers 20 items per second
## How to Use
- Open the Box's GUI by right-clicking.
- Put an item into the green slot at bottom-right of the Box's GUI as a target item.
- If you have less than 32 of the target items, the Box will put them into your inventory.
- If you have more than 32 of the target items, the Box will take them from your inventory.
## Refilling Boxes are useful when...
- You use a potato cannon or a bow (set arrows/vegetables as a target)
- You go mining (set cobblestones or minerals as a target)
- *etc...*
